revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fake_template_list here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fake_template_list for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{| class="wikitable"
|+ Documentation templates
|+ {{navbar|Fake template list|plain=1}}
! Template !! Appearance
|-
| {{tl|fake clarify}} || {{fake clarify}}
|-
| {{tl|fake citation needed}} || {{fake citation needed}}
|-
| {{tl|fake verification needed}} || {{fake verification needed}}
|-
| {{tl|fake explain}} || {{fake explain}}
|-
| {{tl|fake heading}} || {{fake heading}}
|-
| {{tl|fake notes and references}} || {{fake notes and references}}
|-
| {{tl|dummy reference}} || {{dummy reference}}
|-
| {{tl|dummy backlink}} || {{dummy backlink}}
|-
| {{tl|dummy footnote}} || {{dummy footnote}}
|-
|{{tl|fake link}} || {{fake link}}
|-
|{{tl|fake redlink}} || {{fake redlink}}
|-
|}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
<!--Categories go on the /doc subpage.-->

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fake_template_list for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{| class="wikitable"
|+ Documentation templates
|+ {{navbar|Fake template list|plain=1}}
! Template !! Appearance
|-
| {{tl|fake clarify}} || {{fake clarify}}
|-
| {{tl|fake citation needed}} || {{fake citation needed}}
|-
| {{tl|fake verification needed}} || {{fake verification needed}}
|-
| {{tl|fake explain}} || {{fake explain}}
|-
| {{tl|fake heading}} || {{fake heading}}
|-
| {{tl|fake notes and references}} || {{fake notes and references}}
|-
| {{tl|dummy reference}} || {{dummy reference}}
|-
| {{tl|dummy backlink}} || {{dummy backlink}}
|-
| {{tl|dummy footnote}} || {{dummy footnote}}
|-
|{{tl|fake link}} || {{fake link}}
|-
|{{tl|fake redlink}} || {{fake redlink}}
|-
|}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
